output.summary: Fixed three desktop display issues: (1) Added md:open:p-6 padding to details element so content has proper spacing inside the rounded background panel, (2) Added md:open:flex-1 and flex display to make active details stretch to fill available height, (3) Removed hover effects and pointer cursor from summary on desktop to prevent it from looking interactive.

filesModified.purpose: Added md:open:p-6 for desktop padding, md:open:flex md:open:flex-col md:open:flex-1 for height stretch, md:cursor-default md:hover:bg-transparent md:group-open:hover:bg-transparent to disable summary hover on desktop
Mirrored PHP changes - added desktop padding, flex properties, and disabled summary hover effects on desktop
Added md:items-stretch to tabs-panels container to enable child details stretching
Mirrored PHP changes - added md:items-stretch to tabs-panels container

issues.title: Missing padding on desktop panel
issues.description: The details element had md:open:bg-accent-lighter and md:rounded-3xl but no padding, causing content to sit flush against the panel edges on desktop.

fix.description: Added md:open:p-6 to the details element
fix.impact: Content now has proper 1.5rem (24px) padding inside the rounded panel on desktop

issues.title: Panel doesn't stretch to fill tablist height
issues.description: The active details element wraps its content tightly and doesn't fill the available vertical space, unlike the old architecture where the panels container background stretched.

fix.description: Made the open details element a flex container that stretches to fill available height
fix.impact: The active tab panel now stretches to match the tablist height, creating a balanced layout

issues.title: Summary hover effect on desktop
issues.description: The summary element has cursor-pointer and hover:bg-accent-light which makes it look interactive on desktop, even though JS prevents the click. This creates user confusion as it appears clickable but doesn't respond.

fix.description: Disabled hover effects and changed cursor to default on desktop
fix.impact: Summary no longer looks interactive on desktop, reducing user confusion. Mobile hover effects preserved.

detailsElement.after: md:hidden md:open:flex md:open:flex-col md:open:flex-1 md:open:bg-accent-lighter md:border-0 md:rounded-3xl md:open:p-6
added: md:open:flex - Make open details a flex container on desktop
md:open:flex-1 - Stretch to fill available space in parent flex container
md:open:p-6 - Add 1.5rem padding inside the panel
removed: md:open:block - Replaced with md:open:flex for better layout control

summaryElement.before: tabs-item-summary p-6 list-none flex gap-4 items-start appearance-none [&::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent-light group-open:hover:bg-accent transition-colors md:mb-8 md:p-0
summaryElement.after: tabs-item-summary p-6 list-none flex gap-4 items-start appearance-none [&::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent-light group-open:hover:bg-accent transition-colors md:mb-8 md:p-0 md:cursor-default md:hover:bg-transparent md:group-open:hover:bg-transparent
added: md:cursor-default - Change cursor from pointer to default on desktop
md:hover:bg-transparent - Remove hover background on desktop
md:group-open:hover:bg-transparent - Remove open state hover background on desktop

panelsContainer.before: tabs-panels flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4 md:gap-0
panelsContainer.after: tabs-panels flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4 md:gap-0 md:items-stretch
added: md:items-stretch - Allow child details to stretch to fill container height on desktop

warnings: webpack performance warnings (asset size limits) - expected and not blocking
eslint exhaustive-deps warning in Tabs.tsx - expected, intentional pattern

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP have identical class structures. All responsive utilities and state variants match exactly.

testPage.notes: No changes needed to test page. The fixes improve desktop rendering and UX.

fixesApplied.description: Added proper padding to desktop tab panel
fixesApplied.impact: Content no longer flush against panel edges, proper visual spacing

fixesApplied.description: Made active tab panel stretch to fill available height
fixesApplied.impact: Panel height now matches tablist height for balanced desktop layout

fixesApplied.description: Removed interactive appearance from summary on desktop
fixesApplied.impact: Eliminates user confusion - summary no longer looks clickable on desktop where it's non-functional

desktop.padding: Open tab panel now has 1.5rem (24px) padding on all sides inside the rounded background
desktop.height: Open tab panel stretches vertically to match the height of the tablist on the left
desktop.cursor: Summary title shows default cursor instead of pointer, doesn't show hover effects
desktop.appearance: More polished, consistent spacing, better visual balance between tablist and panel

mobile.changes: No changes - mobile accordion behavior unchanged
mobile.padding: Still uses p-6 on summary and px-6 pb-6 pt-2 on content
mobile.cursor: Still shows pointer cursor and hover effects as intended for interactive accordions

notes: The md:open: variant only applies when details has [open] attribute on desktop
md:open:flex replaced md:open:block to enable flex-1 stretching
md:open:flex-col ensures content stacks vertically inside the panel
md:open:flex-1 makes the open details take up available space in the flex column
md:items-stretch on parent allows the details to stretch to fill height
md:open:p-6 provides consistent padding matching the tablist button padding
Summary hover effects disabled only on desktop (md:), preserved on mobile
All changes use responsive (md:) and state (:open, :hover, group-open:) variants
